Inquiry	
B/L No.
Container No.
Booking No.
		Search
B/L No.
(Status)	Booking No.	Container No.	Size/Type	CGO	Departure	Arrival	VSL / VOY	Reserve/
Confirm
KSP0000464 S/Waybill Issue	BH00000556	20 GP		KHALIFA BIN SALMAN PORT%%BUSAN NEW PORT
202602231726%%202603290548	BUSAN NEW PORT%%INCHEON
202603180900%%202603301248	1)GFS GALAXY/02604E%%2)KMTC DALIAN/2603S	




















Note that the information after the date of inquiry is an expected scheduled, so it may change due to various circumstances.
- Especially T/S schedule via Feeder/Rail/Truck could be more changeable.
- Freetime will be calculated from the date of actual arrival at Place of Delivery
- For 2nd mother vessels, shipment confirmation is made 1-2 days before departure.
- Information on land transportation such as railway transportation and feeder vessels, excluding the sea transportation segment, will be provided on the map at a later time.
